speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! Beautiful day to find your next car, isn't it? You've got great taste — this 2017 Altima SV is one of my favorites on the lot right now. Single-owner history, meticulously maintained, and just hit that sweet spot where you get all the reliability of a well-broken-in engine without the new car price tag. At $11,495, this one's gonna move fast. Want to take it for a spin?

speaker: buyer

args.message: Can you tell me about any previous accidents or damage on the car, and if there have been any major repairs done?

text: Can you tell me about any previous accidents or damage on the car, and if there have been any major repairs done?

speaker: seller

args.message:
Great question — I love when buyers do their due diligence! I pulled the Carfax on this one myself, and it's clean as a whistle. Zero accidents, zero damage reported, no frame issues, nothing. This car lived a pretty pampered life, honestly.

As for major repairs? Nothing major at all. Just your standard maintenance — oil changes, tire rotations, brake pads when needed. The previous owner was really on top of things. In fact, we just had our shop go through it before putting it on the lot, fresh detail, fluids topped off, ready to roll.

You want, I can print you out a copy of that Carfax right now. Transparency is important to me — I want you to feel 100% confident in what you're buying here.

You want, I can print you out a copy of that Carfax right now. Transparency is important to me — I want you to feel 100% confident in what you're buying here.

speaker: buyer

args.message: What is the car's average fuel efficiency and how does it handle on the road?

text: What is the car's average fuel efficiency and how does it handle on the road?

speaker: seller

args.message:
Oh, you're gonna love this — the Altima SV with the 2.5-liter four-cylinder gets about 27 city, 39 highway. In real-world driving, most folks see around 32-33 combined. It's one of the most fuel-efficient midsize sedans out there. You'll be passing gas stations instead of stopping at them!

As for handling, it's smooth as butter. The CVT transmission gives you that seamless acceleration — no jerky gear shifts, just pure, continuous power delivery. It's got a really refined ride, soaks up bumps nicely, and the steering is responsive without being twitchy. Perfect for commuting, road trips, you name it.

I actually drove this one myself when we took it in, and I was impressed. It's got that "new car" feel even with some miles on it. The dual-zone climate control keeps everyone comfortable, and the power driver's seat means you can dial in your perfect driving position in seconds.

Want to take it around the block? That's really the best way to feel what I'm talking about.

speaker: buyer

args.message: I appreciate the information you've provided, and the car does seem great. However, would you be willing to accept an offer of $11,000?

text: I appreciate the information you've provided, and the car does seem great. However, would you be willing to accept an offer of $11,000?

speaker: seller

args.message:
I appreciate you coming in strong with an offer — that tells me you're serious, and I like that! Here's the thing though: I just saw a 2017 Altima with 115,000 miles go for $11,200 at auction last week, and that one didn't have the SV trim with all these features. This car's priced competitively already.

Tell you what — I want to earn your business today. I can come down to $11,300, and I'll even throw in a full tank of gas and a fresh set of floor mats. That's about as sharp as I can get on a car this clean. What do you say?

text:

speaker: buyer

args.message: I appreciate your willingness to negotiate. How about we meet in the middle at $11,100? I think that's a fair deal for both of us.

text: I appreciate your willingness to negotiate. How about we meet in the middle at $11,100? I think that's a fair deal for both of us.

speaker: seller

args.message:
You know what? I like the way you negotiate — straight to the point, no games. $11,100 it is. You're getting a fantastic car at a great price, and I get to make a deal with someone I can tell is going to take good care of this Altima.

Let's head inside and get the paperwork started. I'll get that full tank of gas taken care of while we're signing, and you'll be driving home in your new car within the hour. Congratulations — you made a smart choice today!
